mapper.insert: INSERT INTO request (customer_id, category_id, title, description, hope_price, requested_due_date, status) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{hopePrice}, #{requestedDueDate}, 'OPEN')
INSERT INTO attachment (ref_type, ref_id, image_url, origin_name, is_thumbnail) VALUES (#{refType}, #{refId}, #{imageUrl}, #{originName}, #{isThumbnail})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, a.image_url AS thumbnailPath, c.name AS categoryName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM request_tag WHERE request_id = r.request_id) AS tags FROM request r LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM attachment WHERE is_thumbnail = 1 AND ref_type = 'REQ') a ON r.request_id = a.ref_id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.category_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, a.image_url AS thumbnailPath, c.name AS categoryName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM request_tag WHERE request_id = r.request_id) AS tags FROM request r LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM attachment WHERE is_thumbnail = 1 AND ref_type = 'REQ') a ON r.request_id = a.ref_id LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.category_id WHERE r.request_id = #{requestId}

SELECT r.*, c.name AS categoryName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM request_tag WHERE request_id = r.request_id) AS tags FROM request r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.category_id WHERE r.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, c.name AS categoryName FROM request r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.name = #{category} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE request SET status = #{status} WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attachment WHERE ref_id = #{requestId} AND ref_type = 'REQ'
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, c.name AS categoryName FROM request r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.category_id WHERE r.status = 'OPEN' AND r.requested_due_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY r.requested_due_date ASC LIMIT 5
SELECT r.*, c.name AS categoryName FROM request r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.category_id WHERE r.status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT r.title AS description, r.request_id FROM request r WHERE r.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 3
